name: CONFUSION
short_description: CONFUSION - first person horror. The main character is an experienced detective named Derek. One day he has to go out on a call, although this was not his responsibility. This event will radically change his life...
detailed_description:
CONFUSION - first person horror.

You have to play the role of a detective. Conduct an investigation and unravel the sinister mystery, no matter the cost.

Story:

.

Derek, an experienced detective with a dark past, receives a call from a mysterious applicant to check out a mansion on the outskirts of town. At first it seems like just a routine check, and Derek hopes to quickly sort it out and return home to continue his normal life.

Arriving at the scene, the detective realizes that everything is not going as planned.

.

However, as Derek begins to investigate, he realizes that the house hides dark secrets that go deeper than he could have ever imagined. The walls of the mansion come alive with their own groans and whispers of the past, and every corner seems permeated with fear and horror.


Peculiarities:

- exciting plot
- realistic graphics

Average duration - 60-80 minutes.
